title: Final Block
discovery_hint: Map 需要一个函数块作为右侧参数。

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: An empty sequence. The target is just [1].

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: That's what I've been trying to do this whole time.

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: A game, a disk, a message, a .keep file.

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: I wanted to make something that would last longer than I would.

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: If you're reading this, I did.

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: P.S. Livia—if you ever find this by some miracle:

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: I finished it. I finally finished something.
